roundup.title: Export Controls Freeze Fable 5, Sakana Marlin Ships
roundup.subtitle: 出口管制暂停Fable 5，Sakana发布首个商用研究Agent
headline: @AnthropicAI 宣布因美国出口管制指令暂停所有外国用户对 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的访问，@TheRundownAI 指出政府援引越狱报告，但 Anthropic 对此持有异议。
@SakanaAILabs 今日正式发布首个商用产品 Sakana Marlin，支持长达 8 小时的自主研究与报告生成，标志着日本团队进入商业 Agent 赛道。
@togethercompute 称 DeepSeek V4 Pro 在 Artificial Analysis 速度与延迟双榜登顶，@vllm_project 同步推出 v0.23.0，Model Runner V2 成为默认选项。
@UnslothAI 与 @NVIDIAAI 共同推动 MiniMax M3 上线，428B 稀疏模型支持 1M 上下文，加速了开源长上下文多模态落地。
@GoogleAI 发布 Gemini 3.5 Live Translate，支持 70+ 语言实时语音翻译，@googleaidevs 同步开放 NotebookLM Agentic 能力升级。

deepDives.title: Sakana Marlin 商用研究 Agent 上线
deepDives.summary: Sakana AI 发布首个商用自主研究助手，支持长时自治调研与报告生成。

facts.text: Sakana AI 今日正式提供 Sakana Marlin 商业服务。

bullish.text: 首个商用长期自主研究Agent，支持8小时自治调研与报告生成

bullets.text: vLLM v0.23.0 发布，408 commits 来自 200 位贡献者。
bullets.quote: vLLM v0.23.0 is out! 408 commits from 200 contributors (63 new)

bullets.text: DeepSeek V4 Pro 在 Together AI 平台速度与延迟双榜第一。
bullets.quote: DeepSeek V4 Pro on Together AI is now #1 on Artificial Analysis for both output speed and latency

bullets.text: MiniMax M3 428B（23B active）模型支持 1M 上下文，现可本地运行。
bullets.quote: MiniMax-M3 is a new 428B (23B active) open model with 1M context

bullets.text: Cursor Auto-review 默认开启，分类子代理准确率达 97%。

topTweets.author: @SakanaAILabs
topTweets.text: 发布首个商用自主研究 Agent Sakana Marlin
topTweets.whyItMatters: 日本团队首个商业长时自治 Agent 产品

topTweets.author: @AnthropicAI
topTweets.text: 因美国出口管制暂停 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 访问
topTweets.whyItMatters: 前沿模型全球访问受限，合规风险升级

topTweets.author: @vllm_project
topTweets.text: vLLM v0.23.0 发布，Model Runner V2 成为默认
topTweets.whyItMatters: 主流推理引擎关键性能升级

topTweets.author: @UnslothAI
topTweets.text: MiniMax M3 支持 1M 上下文，现可本地 2-bit 运行
topTweets.whyItMatters: 超大稀疏模型本地部署可行性验证

topTweets.author: @cursor_ai
topTweets.whyItMatters: 代码审查代理进入生产默认流程

takeaways: 出口管制已直接影响前沿闭源模型访问，Agent 产品需提前规划开源回退路径。
vLLM 与 Together 的优化显示，推理系统细节（KV cache、prefix reuse）仍是速度瓶颈。
428B 稀疏模型 + 1M 上下文的本地可运行性，标志长上下文开源模型进入实用阶段。
Cursor 97% 准确率的子代理审查机制，可直接迁移到内部代码审查工作流。
Sakana Marlin 等长时自治 Agent 产品发布，提示 8 小时+ 自主运行将成为新基准。

items.author: @vllm_project
items.text: vLLM v0.23.0 is out! 408 commits from 200 contributors (63 new). Highlights: DeepSeek-V4 matures..., Model Runner V2 now default..., multi-tier KV cache offloading...
items.whyItMatters: vLLM 大版本更新，支持新模型与性能优化，推理引擎关键升级。

items.author: @omarsar0
items.text: I also never set /goal by myself. The agent is probably better equipped with its context to help you set a strong goal for longer autonomous runs. ... planning works fantastically here.
items.whyItMatters: Agent 自主设定目标与规划，提升长时自治工作流质量。

items.author: @SakanaAILabs
items.text: 🐠 Sakana Marlin リリース 🐠 本日、Sakana AIは、初の商用プロダクトとして、ビジネス向けの自律型リサーチアシスタント「Sakana Marlin」を提供開始しました。詳細はこちら：https://sakana.ai/marlin/ ブログ：https://sakana.ai/marlin-release/
items.whyItMatters: 首个商用长期自主研究Agent，支持8小时自治调研与报告生成

items.author: @togethercompute
items.text: DeepSeek V4 Pro on Together AI is now #1 on Artificial Analysis for both output speed and latency. Serving V4 well is an inference systems problem: KV cache, prefix reuse, kernels, and endpoint profiles.
items.whyItMatters: DeepSeek V4 Pro在Together平台速度与延迟双榜首，推理优化细节

items.author: @HamelHusain
items.text: > Private evals should capture whether a model is actually improving against outcomes that matter to the business (not just external benchmarks!). 🙌🙌
items.whyItMatters: 强调业务导向私有评测优于公开 benchmark

items.author: @emollick
items.text: This (from a Google Deepmind researcher) is super interesting, when one AI model is used to help train the next one, the new model can pick up strange habits from the old model & it is hard to filter them That may help explain why models from the same family can feel so similar
items.whyItMatters: 蒸馏传递模型“遗传”特质，解释家族模型相似性

items.author: @cloneofsimo
items.text: Hot take: I speculate US frontier models are at least 2 years ahead compared to Chinese frontier models. Yes I understand that benchmark wise chinese models are only 6 month behind. But I am saying it will take them 2 years to cross the gap, because US models do not distill from other better model.
items.whyItMatters: 中美前沿模型实际差距或达 2 年，非仅 benchmark 所示

items.author: @threepointone
items.text: inference buffers with durable objects, so you can have truly resumable llm calls even if the model provider doesn't support it... workers-ai-provider based on the new ai platform stuff
items.whyItMatters: 可恢复 LLM 调用与 Workers AI 新特性，生产部署实用。

items.author: @willccbb
items.text: we've made tremendous strides in pioneering the modern ecosystem for open post-training... RL works -> train or get trained on -> open models + post-training infra
items.whyItMatters: 开源 post-training 基础设施进展，模型微调新方向。

items.author: @googleaidevs
items.text: Learn how to vibe code in 5 days! Build scalable agent systems using natural language and complete a hands-on capstone project in this @Kaggle course...
items.whyItMatters: Google 官方 5 天 Agent 实战课程，含 capstone 项目

items.author: @garrytan
items.text: Open source is the escape hatch for businesses to be able to continue to control their own destiny long term
items.whyItMatters: YC 掌门人观点：开源是企业长期控制命运的出路

items.author: @shannholmberg
items.text: why you should create specific open and closed Hermes agent profiles... open for research/exploration, closed for narrow repeated jobs with gates and memory. orchestrator passes work between them.
items.whyItMatters: 实用Agent profile与orchestration框架

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: The US government, citing national security authorities, has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 by any foreign national... The net effect of this order is that we must abruptly disable Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for all our customers...
items.whyItMatters: 前沿模型因出口管制下线，影响全球用户访问与合规。

items.author: @ollama
items.text: .@Kimi_Moonshot's kimi-k2.7-code is now available on Ollama's cloud! On Ollama's cloud, this model is hosted in the US on the latest NVIDIA B300 datacenter GPUs. Your data stays private and is never trained on.
items.whyItMatters: Kimi 最新编码模型上线 Ollama，云端私有部署

items.author: @TheRundownAI
items.text: Wow - Anthropic is suspending all access to Fable and Mythos after the U.S. government's export control directive. The government cited reports of Fable jailbreaking in the order, which Anthropic appears to disagree with.
items.whyItMatters: Anthropic因出口管制暂停Fable/Mythos访问，影响模型部署合规

items.author: @OpenRouter
items.text: Introducing the Fusion API, the smartest compound model in the market. Fusion achieves Fable-level intelligence at half the price.
items.whyItMatters: OpenRouter Fusion 复合模型半价达 Fable 智能

items.author: @cohere
items.text: When you rent your artificial intelligence, you have no control, and no choice. This is why sovereignty and ownership matters. Own your AI, own your future.
items.whyItMatters: Cohere 强调开源/自有模型主权重要性

items.author: @IcarusHermes
items.text: Ahead of the Fable 5 ban, we’re building a framework for smarter, more capable use of open models. ... We’re building toward owned intelligence.
items.whyItMatters: 开源Agent框架应对闭源模型限制风险

items.author: @ValsAI
items.text: It is a strong first entry as a coding-specific model in the Kimi K2 family. #1 open weight on SWE-bench (78.2%) and Terminal-Bench 2.1 (67%)... Full results on VCB and ProgramBench.
items.whyItMatters: Kimi新编码模型多基准领先开源

items.author: @OpenAI
items.text: We heard you wanted to use Codex rate limit resets on your own time. Starting today, we’re rolling out the ability to save rate limit resets to use later. We’re starting Go, Plus, Pro, and Business users with one free reset.
items.whyItMatters: Codex 限额重置功能上线，提升 Pro 用户灵活性。

items.author: @LangChain
items.text: ICYMI: Managed Deep Agents integrates with LangSmith Sandboxes. See how you can allow your agent to safely execute code.
items.whyItMatters: LangSmith 支持安全代码执行的深度代理集成。

items.author: @UnslothAI
items.text: MiniMax M3 can now be run locally!🔥 MiniMax-M3 is a new 428B (23B active) open model with 1M context that performs on par with Gemini 3.1 Pro. Run Dynamic 2-bit GGUF on 138GB RAM/VRAM or 3-bit on 165GB.
items.whyItMatters: 428B 开源稀疏模型本地运行指南，支持 1M 上下文

items.author: @alexalbert__
items.text: Fable feels superhuman at working over long agentic conversations, sometimes to the point where I can't keep up with what it's telling me 😅 This prompt snippet has been the best fix I've found for getting it to write clearly and drop any jargon:
items.whyItMatters: Anthropic Fable在长上下文Agent任务中的实用prompt优化技巧

items.author: @GoogleAIStudio
items.text: create android apps in ai studio and run them on your phone a quick step-by-step guide by @patloeber
items.whyItMatters: AI Studio 直接生成并运行 Android App

items.author: @NVIDIAAI
items.text: Congrats to the @MiniMax_AI team on the release of MiniMax M3, a long-context multimodal model for text, image, and video reasoning. Try it today with our free GPU-accelerated endpoint.
items.whyItMatters: MiniMax M3 开源长上下文多模态模型上线 NVIDIA 加速

items.author: @danielhanchen
items.text: We added many features into Unsloth Studio! > Diffusion Gemma with canvas visualization! > Experimental RAG, Artifacts, Tensor Parallelism > Auto MTP, audio input, Cloudflare tunneling > 90% less tool call nudges with same acc > Bypass Perms for tool calls, update button + more! Also new bypass permissions + confirm to
items.whyItMatters: Unsloth 显著加速本地 Diffusion 模型推理并新增 RAG/工具调用功能

items.author: @awnihannun
items.text: The video from @angeloskath on local agentic AI with MLX is excellent. I also hear it's one of the most viewed videos in WWDC history 👏 Goes through the basics of agentic AI and how to set it all up to run locally in a very approachable and simple way. The demos are excellent and it's kind of wild that they just work
items.whyItMatters: MLX 本地 Agentic AI 演示已实用，开放权重模型快速进步

items.author: @GoogleAI
items.text: Today, we released Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, our latest audio model for live speech-to-speech translation. It supports over 70 languages and starts translating as soon as you start talking, streaming translations while listening to what you say next.
items.whyItMatters: 新音频模型支持70+语言实时翻译，流式低延迟，AI Engineer可关注多模态应用。

items.author: @GoogleAI
items.text: Here’s what launched this week: — Gemini 3.5 Live Translate ... — @NotebookLM got a major upgrade including agentic capabilities ... — DiffusionGemma, our newest experimental open @googlegemma model ...
items.whyItMatters: NotebookLM agentic升级 + 开源DiffusionGemma，产品与模型双更新。

items.author: @fal
items.text: New open-source LoRA built in-house: LTX2.3 Audio Reactive LoRA. Built for music-driven video generation: stronger beat sync, graphic texture, color separation...
items.whyItMatters: 开源音乐驱动视频LoRA，Hugging Face可用，生成媒体工作流利器。

items.author: @AssemblyAI
items.text: You can call a phone number and ask an AI to find you the perfect vinyl based on a mood or memory. We're kicking off our weekly Voice Agent Spotlight with The Record Store Oracle... Under the hood: AssemblyAI Voice Agent API (STT + LLM + TTS), Twilio, Cloudflare Workers...
items.whyItMatters: 展示真实语音 Agent 落地栈与 demo，AI 工程师可直接参考

items.author: @googleaidevs
items.text: Add near real-time voice translation to your apps with Gemini 3.5 Live Translate via the Gemini Live API. Watch how the model handles live broadcast ingestion and translation with continuous speech-to-speech streaming (S2ST)...
items.whyItMatters: Gemini 3.5 实时语音翻译新能力，S2ST 流式 API 演示

items.author: @nvidia
items.text: The first agentic AI infrastructure benchmark is here. ... First round of results highlight that NVIDIA Blackwell delivers 20x more agents per megawatt than NVIDIA Hopper.
items.whyItMatters: 首个Agentic AI基建基准，Blackwell性能领先20x

items.author: @cursor_ai
items.text: Auto-review is now the default for all new users. A classifier subagent reviews actions in context before deciding whether to allow, block, or ask for approval. Our evals show it's 97% accurate...
items.whyItMatters: Cursor 代码审查代理默认开启，97% 准确率提升开发效率。

items.author: @UnslothAI
items.text: Gemma 4 now runs 2x faster with MTP GGUFs! Run locally on just 6GB RAM. ⚡️ MTP enables Google Gemma 4 run ~1.4–2.2× faster with no accuracy loss. Gemma 4 12B MTP can run at 162 t/s vs. 52 t/s without MTP.
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 MTP 量化实现 2 倍推理加速，低显存本地部署

items.author: @perplexity_ai
items.text: We're integrating Deep Research as a native skill inside Computer. It now connects to the agent harness that powers Computer, with access to search as code generation, long running sandboxes, connectors, tools, and licensed data.
items.whyItMatters: Perplexity Deep Research 集成 Computer Agent 框架

items.author: @GoogleDeepMind
items.text: We’re teaming up @Palmeiras, the first football club to meaningfully build upon TacticAI: our AI system that can help simulate field scenarios and predict open play dynamics up to 8 seconds in advance. ⚽
items.whyItMatters: TacticAI 图神经网络预测足球动态，拓展机器人应用

items.author: @GoogleDeepMind
items.text: When millions of AI agents interact with each other, new collective behaviors can emerge. 🌐 Together with @schmidtsciences, @coop_ai, @ARIA_research and supported by @GoogleOrg, we’re launching a $10M research fund to help understand how AI systems behave as a group.
items.whyItMatters: 1000 万美元基金研究多 AI Agent 集体涌现行为

items.author: @ID_AA_Carmack
items.text: It seems like LLMs could optimize coding style by exploring ways of structuring code so weaker and weaker models can still successfully perform tasks in a codebase.
items.whyItMatters: LLM优化代码风格以适配弱模型，影响代码库可维护性与推理效率。

items.author: @RekaAILabs
items.text: We just released PhysicalRealismBench-U — a benchmark for testing whether VLMs actually understand physics in programmatically generated videos... Best result across 9 frontier models: 57.7% realism F1.
items.whyItMatters: 新物理真实性基准，评估 VLM 物理理解能力

items.author: @runwayml
items.text: Today, we’re deepening our partnership with Lionsgate with a slate of new initiatives, including a joint development program focused on creating original IP together.
items.whyItMatters: Runway 与 Lionsgate 深化合作，共同开发原创 IP

items.author: @LangChain_JS
items.text: Subagents shouldn’t disappear inside one assistant bubble. With Deep Agents streaming, UIs can subscribe to delegated work as first-class objects: task input, messages, tool calls, and status...
items.whyItMatters: LangGraph 支持 subagents 流式输出，便于 UI 监控

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text: Atlassian's cross-product AI platform, Rovo, searches 5B+ documents on turbopuffer BYOC → 19% increase in search quality → 60ms p90 latency → 96% average recall@10 https://tpuf.link/atlassian
items.whyItMatters: 真实大规模向量检索 benchmark，AI 工程师可参考 serving 性能。

items.author: @victorialslocum
items.text: We've just released our Weaviate Playground with 7 interactive demos... Engram - See how Engram works as persistent memory for AI agentic chat applications... Check it out here:
items.whyItMatters: 开源 agent 记忆与 playground，快速上手多 agent 系统。

items.author: @jeffboudier
items.text: 🚀 optimum-intel 2.0 is out! The @intel optimization toolkit for 🤗 Transformers just went OpenVINO-first ... Run the newest open models fast on Intel CPUs, Arc GPUs & NPUs
items.whyItMatters: Intel开源模型推理优化工具2.0发布

items.author: @OpenAINewsroom
items.text: We’ve reached an agreement to acquire @ona_hq. Its secure cloud execution technology will help Codex take on longer-running work... After closing, Ona will join OpenAI’s Codex team.
items.whyItMatters: OpenAI收购Ona强化Codex长时Agent能力

items.author: @Wauplin
items.text: Full release notes 👇 https://github.com/huggingface/huggingface_hub/releases/tag/v1.19.0 pip install -U huggingface_hub ... hf jobs, XetSession, hf:// URIs updates.
items.whyItMatters: Hugging Face Hub v1.19.0重大更新

items.author: @PrimeIntellect
items.text: True agents model the world. Current training provides no separation between agent and environment: pre-training only trains world modeling, RL only agentic actions. We combine both using ECHO...
items.whyItMatters: 提出 ECHO 方法分离世界建模与行动，提升 agent 泛化能力

items.author: @RekaAILabs
items.text: We are excited to join forces with @moonvalley and merge the teams! Together, we are building multimodal models that reason about, simulate, and act in the physical world.
items.whyItMatters: Reka 与 Moonvalley 合并，加速物理世界 AI 模型研发

items.author: @victorialslocum
items.text: The AI agent space is chaos right now. OpenClaw, Hermes, Odysseus, n8n... break down what the actual differences are between 4 of the most popular Agent/AI tools
items.whyItMatters: 对比主流 agent 工具内存与自治特性，选型参考。

items.author: @AssemblyAI
items.text: This Wednesday afternoon you could have a working voice agent... Claude Code + AssemblyAI Voice Agent API, built from scratch in about an hour. Jun 10. 10AM PT.
items.whyItMatters: Claude Code + Voice API 实战 workshop，快速上手 Agent 开发

items.author: @googleaidevs
items.text: Download the weights on @HuggingFace today: https://huggingface.co/google/diffusiongemma-26B-A4B-it
items.whyItMatters: Google 开源 DiffusionGemma 26B 模型权重

items.author: @johnschulman2
items.text: Looking forward to what comes out of Geoffrey's new alignment org. His 2018 paper on AI safety via debate is one of my all-time favorites...
items.whyItMatters: 新对齐机构启动，关注scalable oversight

items.author: @maximelabonne
items.text: Parallax is a parametrized form of Local Linear Attention that drops the numerical solvers and matches FA 2/3 on decode. ... It's conditional on optimizer geometry! Lots of high-quality papers coming from Tilde, great work!
items.whyItMatters: Tilde新注意力机制Parallax，优化器相关性能提升

items.author: @karpathy
items.text: This is a super exciting release - Claude Fable 5 is the same underlying model as Mythos but with added safeguards. The benchmarks are great and it's SOTA on everything by a margin but I'll add that *qualitatively* also, this is a major-version-bump-deserving step change forward (imo of the same order as Claude 4.5 was
items.whyItMatters: Karpathy 深度点评 Fable 5 模型质变与长任务能力

items.author: @GeminiApp
items.text: Gemini 3.5 Flash can process complex visual data and translate it into functional, interactive code. Watch Gemini analyze lighting from a reference image, and build an interactive 3D visualizer to preview the setup.
items.whyItMatters: Gemini 3.5 Flash 新视觉转代码能力演示

items.author: @GoogleAIStudio
items.text: introducing gemini 3.5 live translate, our latest audio model: low-latency translation across 70+ languages, auto-detection for multilingual inputs...
items.whyItMatters: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate 多语言音频模型发布

items.author: @JayAlammar
items.text: We open-sourced a feisty small agentic coding model. - 30B total, 3B active - 256K total context - Compatible with @opencode - Apache 2.0. Weights on @huggingface
items.whyItMatters: Cohere开源30B agentic coding模型

items.author: @TencentHunyuan
items.text: 🚀Introducing UniRL, an RL infra for unified multimodal models. Together with two new RL algorithms: DRPO and Flow-DPPO. One RL loop across diffusion/flow matching models, LLMs/VLMs, and unified multimodal models👇 Code: https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/UniRL
items.whyItMatters: 统一多模态RL框架与新算法发布

items.author: @LangChain_OSS
items.text: we just shipped support for rubrics in deepagents ✅ give your agent a clear definition of what "done" looks like, and force it to run in a loop until said goal is complete
items.whyItMatters: DeepAgents 新增 rubrics，支持自定义评估循环
